title: TychoTyke Kids Light Up 10 Inch Flying Disc Outdoor Fun Picnic Park Toys Orange
description:
Promote exercise during playtime with the TychoTyke Light Up Flying Disc! This classic kids' toy is great for encouraging kids to run around and get some exercise while having fun outdoors with their friends. The disc has a 10" diameter and is easy for kids of all ages to play with. It comes with three 1.5V LR41 batteries that make the disc light up during flight, so kids will love playing with this toy day or night. The flying disc is constructed of durable plastic that will ensure hours and hours of fun, and the bright orange color makes it easy to spot so you don't have to worry about it getting lost. Even adults will like joining in on the fun! Additionally, it doubles as a great fetch toy for dogs
